== Notes for [[Item:Q113909|Q113909]] ==

Pedro Rodriguez de Monterroso, 5th Conde de Monterroso

* b. circa 1180

* Father Rodrigo Romanez de Monterroso, 4th Conde de Monterroso1 b. c 1140
* Mother Udraica Guterrez1 b. c 1155

==Spouse==

* Married Agilona Soares Dera b. c 1190, daughter of Soeiro Ozorez Dera, circa 1216.1

==Children==

* Arias Perez de Monterroso, Conde de Monterroso & Sta. Marta de Ortigueira+1 b. c 1220

==Citations:==

* [S55] GeneAll.net.
* https://our-royal-titled-noble-and-commoner-ancestors.com/p5269.htm#i158190

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
